ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of course (e.g., SE, VO, PR, VL) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the semester the course is offered in */,
  "hours" REAL /* Number of hours the course is worth */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_divisions" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the course */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the semester */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term of the semester (e.g., Spring, Fall) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_conflicts" (
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conflict */,
  "course_id_1" INTEGER /* Identifier of the first course in the conflict */,
  "course_id_2" INTEGER /* Identifier of the second course in the conflict */,
  "conflict_type" TEXT /* Type of conflict (e.g., time, room) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the conflict resolution (e.g., unresolved, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conflict_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)
column_names: Type of course (e.g., SE, VO, PR, VL)
Identifier of the semester the course is offered in
Number of hours the course is worth
Maximum number of students allowed in the course
Term of the semester (e.g., Spring, Fall)
Identifier of the first course in the conflict
Identifier of the second course in the conflict
Status of the conflict resolution (e.g., unresolved, resolved)
Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, dropped)
